LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE REGARDING THE AMOUNT THAT DEFENDANT OWES TO PLAINTIFF. MOREOVER, PLAINTIFF DID NOT SATISFY ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION SHOWING THAT THERE ARE NO TRIABLE ISSUES AS TO ANY OF DEFENDANT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
